aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 从广泛关注AI基础设施转向聚焦人形机器人领域，尤其看好Agility Robotics（CCXI）作为首个纯美股人形机器人上市机会。
representative_quotes: The main areas I think are safe however are regulation bound (eg. Medicine), ultra specialized labor, or require human/emotional connections. But I think you'll be blown away by the rate of change when frontier technologies become national security races between US and China... especially when China is currently in the lead.
I'm just waiting for both volume ramps to hit. Photonics are generally more volatile than the rest.
Feels like all the industry leaders from $TSM Chairman, $TSLA Elon Musk, to $MU CEO see humanoids as the next major trend so physical AI is probably next.

unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期更聚焦于揭露总统交易中的异常时机和政策关联，语气更加怀疑和警告。
representative_quotes: Weeks later, ICE sought a $220 million deal with the company, according to CNBC. Unusual.
On September 23, 2025, Trump bought up to $1 million of Amazon, $AMZN, stock. On September 25, 2025, Trump's FTC settled a major probe into Amazon... Unusual.
The number of Americans facing unemployment for at least 27 weeks has climbed above 1.8 million on average this year, per CNBC

key_themes: 存储芯片是AI革命的核心，海力士是最佳标的

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期从重仓存储芯片（海力士）转向部分配置康宁GLW和日月光ASX，认为康宁等新领域有更大爆发潜力。
representative_quotes: 存储是AI革命的终极正解。其他股票对比起来，真是一坨垃圾。
康宁GLW 简直是下一代AI算力的底座，中了狗屎运。
英伟达让康宁扩产10倍，那么在投产后说明康宁业绩也要10倍涨幅！
